user.title: Configure Stacked Scenes.
user.description: Set the path to the scene file (default works with Home Assistant OS)

scene_invalid_attribute_for_entity.description:
The scene {scene_id} has an invalid attribute {attribute_name} for the entity {entity_id}.

The attribute is not supported by the entity, and will be ignored by Stacked Scenes when calculating the state to be applied.

Please manually remove the attribute from the entity in the scene definition YAML.
scene_invalid_attribute_for_entity.title: Scene {scene_id} has an invalid attribute for the entity {entity_id}
